title: Charli Mod [RU]
description: This mod adds four unique board games (or something similar) to the game. Each board game has its own unusual functionality.
body:
Sometimes we all get tired of endless adventures, and this mod comes to the rescue. The mod introduces 3 new board games into the game!
- Charli Board
- Dice
- Slot machine
They not only have their own unique functionality but will also beautifully fit into the interior of your home.

This mod is in beta version, much more needs to be added. If you like this first version, you will receive a global update!
